ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Desiccated coconut 25.5%, vegetable fats (palm, shea), sugar, ALMOND (8%), skimmed MILK powder, whey powder (MILK), WHEAT flour, tapioca starch, flavourings, emulsifier: lecithins (SOYA), raising agent (sodium bicarbonate), salt.
